rdf:Description.dc:creator: Holger Kretschmer
rdf:Description.dc:title: Suburban and Underground Train Network Map Frankfurt/Rhein-Main
rdf:Description.dc:description: Schematic network map of existing and planned suburban (S-Bahn), underground (U-Bahn) lines within Frankfurt am Main and the Rhein-Main vicinity
rdf:Description.dc:subject: Frankfurt am Main, Rhein-Main, S-Bahn, U-Bahn, Network plan
